item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-049","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately states there is no measured data and no true comparative conclusion can be drawn.
